name: Steve Hendrix
bio: Steve Hendrix serves as the Van Zandt County Sheriff, overseeing law enforcement for Van Zandt County from the county seat of Canton. Sheriff Hendrix leads a department that provides year-round protection including enhanced security during Canton's famous First Monday Trade Days.
campaignPromises: Provide enhanced security during First Monday Trade Days events
Combat property crime and rural theft throughout the county
Improve radio communications for better county-wide coverage
Maintain a well-trained and professional deputy force
Support anti-drug education programs in county schools
